---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ADITYA-ROUTH
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

> A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

> What did you expect to happen?

## ❌ Actual Behavior

> What actually happened? Include any error messages from the console.

## 📸 Screenshots / Screen Recording

> If applicable, add screenshots or a recording to help explain the problem.

## 🖥 Environment

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| **OS** | e.g. macOS Ventura, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| **Browser** | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125 |
| **Node.js** | e.g. v20.11.0 |
| **Device** | e.g. Desktop / Mobile |
| **GPU** | e.g. NVIDIA RTX 3080 or Intel UHD 620 |

## 🔍 Console Errors

```
Paste any relevant browser console errors here
```

## 📝 Additional Context

> Any other context about the problem. Does it happen consistently or intermittently?
